seoTitle: How to Connect Google Drive to ClickUp
metaDescription: Learn how to link Google Drive to ClickUp so you can attach files to tasks, preview documents, and create new Sheets or Docs without switching apps.
intro: Attaching a spreadsheet or presentation to a task shouldn't require downloading and re-uploading a file. This guide covers connecting your Google account to ClickUp through the App Center, attaching live Drive files directly to a task, and even creating a brand new Google Sheet from inside a ClickUp task card.

steps.heading: Open the App Center
steps.body: Click your profile avatar in ClickUp and launch the App Center to find storage integrations.

steps.heading: Connect Google Drive
steps.body: Scroll to the Storage section, select Google Drive, and click Connect to begin authorization.

steps.heading: Authorize your Google account
steps.body: Pass the Google OAuth consent screen and select the cloud account you want to link.

steps.heading: Attach a Drive file to a task
steps.body: Open a task, click the paperclip attach icon, and select Google Drive to browse and attach a file from your live directory.

steps.heading: Create a new file from a task
steps.body: Use the option inside the task window to create a brand new Google Sheet, Doc, or Slides file directly, syncing instantly to your Drive.

steps.heading: Search for Drive files inside ClickUp
steps.body: Use ClickUp's universal search bar to confirm that your connected Drive files surface alongside your task results.

faq.question: Can I preview a Google Doc without leaving ClickUp?
faq.answer: Yes, attaching a cloud document shows an interactive file chip with a real-time thumbnail preview inside the task.

faq.question: Can I create a new spreadsheet from within a task?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create a brand new Google Sheet directly from inside the task window, and it syncs instantly with your Drive.

faq.question: Will everyone on my team be able to open the attached file?
faq.answer: That depends on your Google Drive sharing permissions for that specific document, which you should manage to ensure your team can access linked assets.

faq.question: Does connecting Google Drive give ClickUp access to my entire account?
faq.answer: The connection is scoped through the Google OAuth consent screen, where you approve the specific access being requested during setup.
